title: notifications core — system-owned category seed
description: Platform-default categories seeded by `notifications:seed-categories`. Each row upserts to `notification_categories` with tenant_id=NULL, is_system=true. Downstream modules (invitations, auth, billing, ...) contribute their own categories via their notifications.json; the seeder walks every module + aggregates. Only the 5 core `system.*` categories live in this file.

categories.description: Wraps the digest delivery. Users cannot opt out of this category directly — they control it via their per-category digest_mode setting.
Major product updates, feature launches, and platform-wide news. Opt-in for consumer tenants, on-by-default for enterprise tenants.
Advance notice of scheduled maintenance windows that will affect service availability. Cannot opt out.
Critical security notifications — unauthorised access attempts, credential leaks, account lockouts. Cannot opt out. Bypasses digest + quiet hours.
GDPR Art. 15 / Art. 20 data export produced + available for download. Signed URL expires in 7 days.
